div.p: Nodes represent operators; edges represent data flow

g.text: Example: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE amount > 1000

div.p: Edges point down (parent → child) Data flows up (child → parent)
estimated_cost = 550.0 Total work to execute this subtree (includes children + this operator)
estimated_rows = 5000 Expected output rows from this node (used by parent for its cost calc)
Output Schema: [id, customer_id, amount, status, ...] Columns available to parent node
Parent pulls from children (Volcano model: next() call)
